prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation on benzene was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-tzvp basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The total electronic energy is approximately -232.33724 Hartree. The HOMO energy is -7.04683 eV, the LUMO energy is -0.41575 eV, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of approximately 6.6311 eV. The SCF converged in 8 cycles. The calculation was conducted with the PySCF backend.
